channel.title: Xiaopeng Yan — News
channel.description: News and updates from Xiaopeng Yan's homepage.

item.title: Joined ByteDance Douyin Push Team
item.description: I joined ByteDance as a retrieval algorithm researcher on the Douyin Push Team.

item.title: Joined Tencent TEG AI Platform
item.description: I joined the AI Platform of TEG at Tencent working on video retrieval.

item.title: M.S. in Computer Science at Sun Yat-sen University
item.description: Obtained my M.S. in computer science at Sun Yat-sen University (HCP Lab).
